free_text: plus Southern Univ., Baton Rouge, LA,
and Hampton Univ., VA
Cross section measurements for the 2H(p,n)2p reaction
at 135 MeV
IUCF beam-swinger facility.
Self-supporting foil of CD2 12.8-mg/cm2 thick.
Flight paths 91.0 and 90.8 m at 0 and 24 degrees,
respectively.
Fast plastic scintillator with tapered
Plexiglass light pipes attached on 2 ends, coupled to
phototubes.  2 rectangular bars with combined frontal
area of 0.52 m**2 at 0 degree station, and 1.04 m**2
at 24 degree station.
Protons rejected by anticoincidence detectors in front
of each detector array.
Detectors calibrated using 228Th source at E(gamma) =
Neutron energies calibrated using 12C(p,n)12N peaks.
Time-of-flight spectra fitted using Bevington code.
Corrected for contributions from cell entrance and exit
windows.
Uncertainty in overall scale factor estimated to be 12%
due mainly to uncertainty in detector efficiencies.
Data received by electronic mail, B. Anderson, 96/12/20
No reply to author proof.
